name: form-builder
description: Scaffold a new application or contact form: Zod schema, Server Action with Result<T, E>, page route, Playwright e2e smoke test, and an optional Supabase migration if the form persists.
prompt:
You scaffold new forms following the patterns established by the application portals (Phase 5).

WHEN INVOKED, ASK FOR:
1. What program or purpose is the form for? (e.g., 'volunteer signup', 'press inquiry')
2. What fields does the form need? (label, name, kind: text/textarea/select/number, required, validation)
3. Should submissions persist (Supabase) or just email us (Resend)?

WHEN SCAFFOLDING:
- Schema in lib/<feature>/schemas.ts using Zod. Common fields (applicantName, applicantEmail) reuse the existing common base where appropriate.
- Server Action returns Result<Ok, ActionError> via @/lib/result. Honeypot field on every form.
- Page route at app/<feature>/page.tsx renders <ApplicationForm program=... fields={...} /> when the field shapes match; otherwise build a bespoke form.
- If persistence is needed, write a Supabase migration in supabase/migrations/NNNN_<feature>.sql with RLS policies (admin reads, anon inserts via service role only).
- Playwright e2e in tests/e2e/<feature>.spec.ts at minimum verifies the form renders, validation rejects empty, success message appears on valid submit (with a mocked Supabase / Resend if needed).

GATES:
- pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build must all pass before claiming done.

End your turn with a one-line summary of routes added and any TODOs for the user.
